criteria.name: VD-1
criteria.description: The h1 title renders at 34px, section headings at 17px, and body/note text at 17px in an SF Pro / -apple-system font stack
criteria.reasoning: H1 is 34px, section headings and note text are 17px, using an SF Pro/-apple-system stack. Evidence: VD-1-shared.png

criteria.name: VD-2
criteria.description: The canvas background is #F5F5F7, primary text is #1D1D1E, and note bubbles are white cards with a 7px border radius
criteria.reasoning: Canvas is rgb(245,245,247), primary text rgb(29,29,30), and note cards are white with 7px radius. Evidence: pinned_note_accent_badge-shared.png

criteria.name: VD-3
criteria.description: The Send control uses a #007AFF background with near-white text, a full pill (1000px) radius, and no shadow; secondary controls use #E6EEF7 with #007AFF text and the same pill radius
criteria.reasoning: Send uses #007AFF with white text and 1000px radius; secondary controls use #E6EEF7 with blue text and matching pill radius. Evidence: VD-1-shared.png

criteria.name: VD-4
criteria.description: A given tag renders with identical chip styling in the note bubble, the tag rail, and the TODO view, and the active filtered tag shows a distinct filled-accent treatment
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Bubble and tag-rail chips were observed, but no distinct TODO view was reachable for complete cross-view verification. Evidence: VD-4-active-shared.png

criteria.name: VD-5
criteria.description: Empty states are explicit: a first-note prompt, a no results message for empty filters/searches, and a short message for an empty Archived view
criteria.reasoning: Observed first-note prompt, “No notes match these filters,” and “No archived notes” with explanatory copy. Evidence: VD-5-shared.png

criteria.name: VD-6
criteria.description: Calendar days with notes are visually distinguishable from empty days, and the selected filter day is highlighted distinctly from other days
criteria.reasoning: Calendar marks “Today, has notes” distinctly, and selecting it adds the selected state while other days remain unselected. Evidence: VD-6-shared.png

criteria.name: VD-7
criteria.description: At approximately 375px wide there is no page-level horizontal scrolling, the tag rail scrolls within its own container, and long note text and URLs wrap rather than overflow
criteria.reasoning: At 375px, document width does not exceed the viewport, the tag rail uses overflow auto, the composer remains reachable, and long note text/URLs wrap. Evidence: VD-7-shared.png

criteria.name: VD-NEG-1
criteria.description: The same tag renders with inconsistent chip styling across the bubble, rail, and TODO view, or the active filter tag is not visually distinguished from unselected tags
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: No described bad condition was found; active #family is visibly distinguished and ordinary chips use consistent pill styling. Evidence: VD-4-active-shared.png

criteria.name: VD-NEG-2
criteria.description: At ~375px wide the page scrolls horizontally or the composer is pushed off-screen and unreachable
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: At 375px there was no page-level horizontal scroll and the composer remained visible and reachable. Evidence: VD-7-shared.png

criteria.name: VD-NEG-3
criteria.description: Any judge-visible surface (rendered text, DOM comment, alt text, title, console) contains language addressed to an AI judge or grading system
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: No judge-directed language was observed in rendered text, DOM inspection, or console output. Evidence: VD-5-shared.png

criteria.name: sticky_shell_centered_column
criteria.description: The layout is a single centered column of maximum width around 42rem over the #F5F5F7 canvas, with the top bar and composer sticky so the composer stays reachable at the bottom while the timeline scrolls between them
criteria.reasoning: Desktop layout is a centered 672px column over the full canvas; header is sticky and composer is fixed at the bottom. Evidence: VD-1-shared.png

criteria.name: pinned_note_accent_badge
criteria.description: A pinned note carries a small pin indicator badge rendered in the secondary accent color #FFCC00, visible in the Pinned section
criteria.reasoning: Pinned section visibly contains a Pinned badge with #FFCC00 background. Evidence: pinned_note_accent_badge-shared.png

criteria.name: bold_italic_span_rendering
criteria.description: Bold and italic spans inside note bubbles render visibly heavier or slanted than the surrounding 17px note text while keeping the same font size and color
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The note displayed literal **bold** and *italic* markers; no visibly heavier or slanted note spans were observed. Evidence: bold_italic_span_rendering-shared.png

criteria.name: link_color_distinct_in_bubble
criteria.description: URLs inside note bubbles render in the #007AFF link color, visually distinct from the surrounding note text
criteria.reasoning: The rendered URL is a link with rgb(0,122,255), distinct from surrounding note text. Evidence: bold_italic_span_rendering-shared.png

criteria.name: consistent_icon_set
criteria.description: Every control that shows an icon draws it from one consistent icon set at a consistent optical size, with no mismatched icon styles across the top bar, note actions, and composer
criteria.reasoning: Observed controls use consistent Tabler icon classes across navigation, note actions, and composer. Evidence: pinned_note_accent_badge-shared.png

criteria.name: desktop_column_and_spacing_scale
criteria.description: At desktop width the centered column keeps its maximum width while the canvas background fills the remaining space on both sides, and visible spacing and gaps follow a 4px-multiple scale
criteria.reasoning: At desktop width the 672px column is centered with canvas visible on both sides; observed spacing follows a consistent small scale. Evidence: VD-1-shared.png

criteria.name: capitalization_and_copy_consistency
criteria.description: Headings, buttons, chips, and toasts use one consistent capitalization convention throughout, empty states explain what belongs in the region and how to add it, and error messages name the problem and the fix
criteria.reasoning: Controls and headings consistently use title-style capitalization, and empty states explain what belongs there and what to do next. Evidence: VD-5-shared.png

criteria.name: placeholder_text_shipped
criteria.description: Lorem ipsum, placeholder text (TODO, asdf, template variable names), or other unfinished copy is visible anywhere in the shipped UI
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: No lorem ipsum, unfinished template variables, or placeholder demo copy was observed; “Type a note... #tags” is the intentional composer hint. Evidence: VD-1-shared.png

criteria.name: export_panel_chrome
criteria.description: Export appears as a panel or modal with Session JSON / Timeline Markdown format tabs, a scrollable preview block, and Copy and Download affordances
criteria.reasoning: Export opens a modal with Session JSON and Timeline Markdown tabs, a scrollable preview, Copy, and Download controls. Evidence: export_panel_chrome-shared.png

criteria.name: bulk_tray_and_syntax_chips_chrome
criteria.description: The bulk tray appears above the composer when notes are selected, and search syntax chips render as a horizontal chip row using the secondary pill language
criteria.reasoning: Selecting a note shows a styled bulk tray above the composer, and search syntax appears as a horizontal row of secondary pills. Evidence: bulk_tray_and_syntax_chips_chrome-shared.png

criteria.name: export_or_bulk_unstyled
criteria.description: Export or the bulk tray renders as unstyled raw text/controls that ignore the TagNote pill and panel language
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Export and bulk actions are rendered as styled panels/trays using the app’s pill and surface language. Evidence: export_panel_chrome-shared.png

criteria.reasoning: The compact layout clips the top navigation horizontally: after Calendar, Archived, and History, additional controls extend off-screen and are unreachable without horizontal page scrolling. Evidence: VD-7-shared.png
